code:
type TxError =
  | Overdraft

value Account
  balance: Int
end

fn deposit(_ acc: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Result<Account, TxError>
  Ok(acc.copy(balance: acc.balance + amount))
end

fn withdraw(_ acc: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Result<Account, TxError>
  if amount > acc.balance
    Err(TxError.Overdraft)
  else
    Ok(acc.copy(balance: acc.balance - amount))
  end
end

fn apply(_ acc: Account, _ res: Result<Account, TxError>) -> Account
  match res
  when Ok(a)
    a
  when Err(_)
    acc
  end
end

fn status(_ res: Result<Account, TxError>) -> String
  match res
  when Ok(_)
    "ok"
  when Err(_)
    "overdraft"
  end
end

let a0 = Account(balance: 100)
let r1 = deposit(a0, 50)
let a1 = apply(a0, r1)
let r2 = withdraw(a1, 30)
let a2 = apply(a1, r2)
let r3 = withdraw(a2, 500)
let a3 = apply(a2, r3)

println("final_balance=#{a3.balance}")
println("last_status=#{status(r3)}")
